programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: Quinn (Scott Adkins, Doctor Strange), a member of a SWAT unit, steps out of a park fountain in an Asian city with no recollection of who he is or where he came from. As he pieces together clues from his past, he vaguely recalls his young daughter, who has been kidnapped. Meanwhile, Conner (Andy On, Zombie Fight Club), a former military operative turned gangster-for-hire, discovers that his wife has also disappeared mysteriously in the middle of the night. These two men, with little in common, realize they must work together to find their loved ones and thwart their mysterious abductors.

programme.title: Fast Vengeance
programme.desc: "Upon hearing of his brother's death, a man named Shen returns to his old stomping grounds to find the men responsible and take justice into his own hands. He learns that a biker named Cobra and his ferocious gang, The Midnight Squad, were the ones responsible ... but to get anywhere close to them, he must enter the dark, turbulent realm of underground motorcycle racing. Enlisting the aid of a drag racing champion-turned-mechanic, Shen must compete in the high-stakes races where he will have one chance to confront Cobra. But when Shen's plan is revealed, he must battle both on the streets and in the ring to obtain his final revenge. Featuring hip-hop legend DMX (Belly, Romeo Must Die), Fast Vengeance is a high-octane action thriller with style — and rubber — to burn."

programme.title: The Loft
programme.desc: Karl Urban and James Marsden star in the tense psychological thriller THE LOFT, the story of five friends who conspire to share a secret penthouse loft in the city - a place where they can indulge their deepest fantasies. But the fantasy becomes a nightmare when they discover the dead body of an unknown woman in the loft and realize one of the group must be involved. Friendships are tested, loyalties are questioned and relationships crumble as the group is consumed by fear, suspicion and murder.

programme.title: Journey to the End of Night

programme.title: Filly Brown
programme.desc: FILLY BROWN is an inspiring and gritty portrait of a young artist striving to find her voice and seize her dreams without compromise. Majo Tonorio, aka, "Filly Brown" is a young, raw hip-hop artist who spits rhymes from the heart. With a mother in prison and a father struggling to provide for his daughters, Majo knows that a record contract could be her family's ticket out. But when a record producer offers her a shot at stardom, she is suddenly faced with the prospect of losing who she is as an artist, as well as the friends who helped her reach the cusp of success. Fueled by a fierce hip-hop score, FILLY BROWN is propelled by an exceptional cast featuring Gina Rodriguez, Lou Diamond Phillips, Edward James Olmos and the legendary Jenni Rivera in her final on-screen performance.

programme.desc: With the contestants narrowed down to 32, Don Mann and Randy Couture reveal a new twist that changes the game: a complex point system that turns survival into a strategic battle. Contestants face grueling military training and a brutal 5K run through Nevada’s desert, testing their endurance and mental toughness. As mentors and adversaries, Don and Randy push the contestants to their limits. This episode marks the beginning of an intense journey where only the strongest and most strategic will prevail.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Episode 3 continues with a grueling desert run under Las Vegas’ heat, where endurance is tested to the extreme. As contestants push through, one unexpectedly stands out. They are then trained with cutting-edge weaponry, showcasing their skills on the course of fire. A high-stakes plank competition follows, with only two contestants left standing. Through intense physical and mental challenges, this episode reveals the contestants’ true character and resilience, setting the stage for more survival tests ahead.

programme.title: Surviving Mann

This episode is a relentless test of endurance, skill, and resilience, as the competition intensifies and only the most determined will claim the title of Ultimate Competition Lead.

programme.title: The Desperate Mission 1969
programme.desc: In The Desperate Mission, Ricardo Montalbán stars as the legendary Joaquin Murrieta, the Mexican folk hero branded an outlaw by those who stole his land and destroyed his family. With a price on his head, he leads a daring fight against corruption, injustice, and betrayal across the California frontier. Filled with adventure, romance, and rebellion, this made-for-TV Western brings the legend of Murrieta to life with passion and fire.

programme.title: Enemy Of The Law
programme.desc: Willis Newcomb and Bart Carroll head a gang engaged in smuggling wanted-American criminals back into the United States from Mexico. Operating from Sharperville, an oil town on the American side of the border, they transport their human cargo in oil drums loaded on trucks. Border Patrolman Tom Sharper intercepts one of the trucks but is overpowered and left for dead
